fields.label: Title
fields.description: Brief title summarizing the market insight

fields.label: Insight Type
fields.options:
Market Trend
Consumer Trend
Industry News
Competitive Intelligence
Technology Change
Regulatory Update
Seasonal Trend
Economic Factor
Supply Chain
Pricing Trend
Demographic Shift
Other
fields.description: Type of market insight

fields.label: Status
fields.options:
Draft
Active
Under Review
Actionable
Monitoring
Archived
fields.description: Current status of the insight

fields.label: Impact Level
fields.description: Potential impact on business

fields.label: Linked Product
fields.description: Specific product this insight relates to

fields.label: Linked Product Family
fields.description: Product family this insight relates to

fields.label: Linked Category
fields.description: Product category this insight relates to

fields.label: Linked Brand
fields.description: Brand this insight relates to

fields.label: Geographic Scope
fields.description: Geographic area affected by this insight

fields.label: Affected Regions
fields.description: Specific regions/countries affected (comma-separated)

fields.label: Trend Direction
fields.options:
Upward
Downward
Stable
Volatile
Emerging
Declining
fields.description: Direction of the market trend

fields.label: Confidence Level
fields.description: Confidence in the accuracy of this insight

fields.label: Valid From
fields.description: When this insight becomes relevant

fields.label: Valid To
fields.description: When this insight expires or should be reviewed

fields.label: Next Review Date
fields.description: When to review this insight for updates

fields.label: Last Verified Date
fields.description: When this insight was last verified

fields.label: Summary
fields.description: Brief summary of the insight (2-3 sentences)

fields.label: Full Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the market insight

fields.label: Primary Data Source
fields.options:
Internal Research
Market Research Report
Industry Publication
Government Data
Competitor Analysis
Customer Feedback
Social Media
Trade Association
News Media
Sales Data
Other
fields.description: Primary source of this insight

fields.label: Source Reference
fields.description: Reference number or citation

fields.label: Source URL
fields.description: Link to source material

fields.label: Supporting Data
fields.description: Key statistics or data points supporting this insight

fields.label: Attachments
fields.description: Supporting documents, reports, or images

fields.label: Potential Opportunities
fields.description: Business opportunities arising from this insight

fields.label: Potential Threats
fields.description: Risks or threats identified by this insight

fields.label: Market Size Value
fields.description: Relevant market size if applicable

fields.label: Market Growth Rate
fields.description: Annual growth rate percentage

fields.label: Estimated Impact Value
fields.description: Potential financial impact on business

fields.label: Impact Timeframe
fields.options:
Immediate (0-3 months)
Short-term (3-12 months)
Medium-term (1-3 years)
Long-term (3+ years)
fields.description: Expected timeframe for impact

fields.label: Recommended Actions
fields.description: Suggested actions to take based on this insight

fields.label: Action Priority
fields.description: Priority for taking action on this insight

fields.label: Action Status
fields.options:
Not Started
In Progress
Completed
Deferred
Not Applicable
fields.description: Status of recommended actions

fields.label: Action Notes
fields.description: Notes on actions taken or planned

fields.label: Assigned To
fields.description: User responsible for monitoring this insight

fields.label: Assigned Team
fields.description: Team or department responsible

fields.label: Created By
fields.description: User who created this insight

fields.label: Key Stakeholders
fields.description: Users who should be notified about this insight

fields.label: Related Insights
fields.description: Names of related Market Insight records (comma-separated)

fields.label: Related Competitor Analysis
fields.description: Link to related competitor analysis

fields.label: Related Product Feedback
fields.description: Link to related product feedback

fields.label: Internal Notes
fields.description: Notes visible only to internal team

fields.label: Tags
fields.description: Comma-separated tags for categorization and search
